findings.evidence: New lemma at `code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/SymmetricPart.lean:85`; Mathlib replacement `IsSelfAdjoint.coe_selfAdjointPart_apply` is at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Star/Module.lean:163`, with matrix symmetry bridge `Matrix.IsSymm.eq` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/Symmetric.lean:39` and real matrix star/transpose bridge at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/ConjTranspose.lean:353,409`.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma, or prove/use it locally by converting `A.IsSymm` to `IsSelfAdjoint A` via `Matrix.IsSymm.eq`, `Matrix.star_eq_conjTranspose`, and `Matrix.conjTranspose_eq_transpose_of_trivial`, then applying `IsSelfAdjoint.coe_selfAdjointPart_apply`.
findings.issue: `Matrix.IsSymm.coe_selfAdjointPart_eq_self` duplicates the generic theorem that self-adjoint elements are fixed by `selfAdjointPart`.

findings.evidence: New lemma at `code/TauCeti/Analysis/PDE/SymmetricPart.lean:96`; Mathlib replacement `IsSelfAdjoint.skewAdjointPart_apply` is at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Star/Module.lean:176`, with `Matrix.IsSymm.eq` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/Symmetric.lean:39` and `Matrix.conjTranspose_eq_transpose_of_trivial`/`Matrix.star_eq_conjTranspose` at `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/ConjTranspose.lean:353,409`.
findings.fix: Remove this lemma, or derive the needed fact from `IsSelfAdjoint.skewAdjointPart_apply` after the same `Matrix.IsSymm` to `IsSelfAdjoint` conversion.
findings.issue: `Matrix.IsSymm.coe_skewAdjointPart_eq_zero` duplicates the generic theorem that self-adjoint elements have zero skew-adjoint part.

summary: Two new `Matrix.IsSymm` projection lemmas are special cases of Mathlib’s generic `IsSelfAdjoint` projection API and should not expose a parallel matrix-specific API.
